EXPLANATION: The paper exists and was published in the proceedings of ICML 2020 under the title "Designing Optimal Dynamic Treatment Regimes: A Causal Reinforcement Learning Approach"; the author list in the citation includes both Junzhe Zhang and his advisor Elias Bareinboim, which is a common and acceptable practice in academic citations.
LINK: https://proceedings.mlr.press/v119/zhang20b.html
FOUND_TITLE: Designing Optimal Dynamic Treatment Regimes: A Causal Reinforcement Learning Approach
FOUND_AUTHORS: Junzhe Zhang, Elias Bareinboim
FOUND_YEAR: 2020
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
